children.predicate: python3 -c 'import json,subprocess; repo="organvm/arca"; tid="DISCOVER-organvm-arca-RANK"; prs=json.loads(subprocess.check_output(["gh","pr","list","--repo","organvm/limen","--state","merged","--search",tid+" in:body","--json","number"])); assert prs; d=json.load(open("value-discovery-dispositions.json")); rows=[x for x in d["dispositions"] if x.get("repo")==repo]; assert len(rows)==1 and rows[0].get("disposition") in {"ranked","archival"} and rows[0].get("receipt"); ranked=set(json.load(open("value-repos.json"))["repos"]); assert (rows[0]["disposition"]=="ranked") == (repo in ranked)'

phases.name: children
phases.completion_gate: all deterministic child tickets archived by TABVLARIVS; all 29 exact typed child packets present; zero pending or rejected child tickets

phases.name: parents
phases.owner_state_gate: re-execute all 52 predicates; done, superseded, and split must pass while normalize and needs_human must remain nonterminal
phases.completion_gate: all parent typed contracts and terminal status patches present with append-only migration logs

application_order: Execute the live MERGED predicates for prerequisite PR #978 and PR #982; any nonzero predicate blocks both phases.
Compile and submit all 29 full child task.upsert tickets through TABVLARIVS, with explicit timestamp, agent, and session identity.
Drain the keeper, then require every deterministic child ticket in the archive, every exact typed child packet on the board, and zero pending or rejected child tickets.

Only after the child completion gate, re-execute all 52 owner predicates and abort stale dispositions; then compile and submit all 52 partial parent task.upsert tickets with append-only dispatch logs.
Drain the keeper again, verify all parent contracts/statuses/logs, validate board schema and frozen-set coverage, and require an empty ticket inbox.

safety.content_boundary: Counts, public identifiers, executable predicates, and durable owner receipts only; no credential values or local corpus material.
